summary: Gantt Chart feature testing COMPLETE. All features working correctly: Gantt chart renders with color-coded bars (gray=yet_to_start, amber=started, green=finished), TODAY marker, zoom controls, legend. PM role correctly hides Value and Additions summary cards. Backend 10/10 tests passed, Frontend 100% pass.
features_verified: ✅ Gantt Chart renders correctly with stage bars showing start_date to target_date
✅ Table/Gantt view toggle buttons work in Project Stages tab
✅ Table view shows Start Date and Target Date columns (7 columns total)
✅ Gantt chart shows TODAY marker, zoom controls, legend
✅ Gantt chart bars are color-coded by status (gray=yet_to_start, amber=started, green=finished)
✅ Backend accepts start_date in stage creation (POST /api/projects/{id}/project-stages)
✅ Backend accepts start_date in stage update (PATCH /api/projects/{id}/project-stages/{id})
✅ Project Manager role cannot see Value and Additions summary cards on Project Detail page
✅ Project Manager role cannot see financial tabs (Payment Schedule, Additional, Deduction, Payment Summary)
✅ Adding new stages form includes Start and End date fields
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent. GanttChart.jsx is well-structured with proper status color mapping.
canSeeFinancials flag (line 1115) correctly hides financial data from PM role.
Backend ProjectStageCreate and ProjectStageUpdate models properly include start_date field.
Table columns correctly show Start Date and Target Date (7 columns total).

test_credentials.Super Admin: Demo Access tab -> 'Super Admin' or 'Login as Demo User' button

seed_data_creation: None - Used existing Villa Murugan project with 9 stages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gantt Chart feature fully tested and working. Project stages now have start_date and target_date fields. Color coding: gray bars = yet_to_start, amber bars = started, green bars = finished. PM role restrictions verified - all financial cards and tabs hidden. Use proj_murugan_001 for testing project stages.
rca_of_issue: N/A - All features working as expected
